mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_agent (project_id, parent_agent_id, role_type, name, llm_channel_id, system_prompt_profile, extra_json, status) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{parentAgentId}, #{roleType}, #{name}, #{llmChannelId}, #{systemPromptProfile}, #{extraJson}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mag_agent SET parent_agent_id = #{parentAgentId}, role_type = #{roleType}, name = #{name}, llm_channel_id = #{llmChannelId}, system_prompt_profile = #{systemPromptProfile}, extra_json = #{extraJson}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mag_agent WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mag_agent WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
